text: It is unlawful for any person to place or erect any sign, signal, or traffic control device for off-highway traffic upon public lands unless authorized by law.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 5. Off-Highway Vehicle Operating Rules [38280 - 38321]
#### Article 1. Traffic Signs, Signals, and Markings [38280 - 38302]
##### § 38302

It is unlawful for any person to place or erect any sign, signal, or traffic control device for off-highway traffic upon public lands unless authorized by law.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1093.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful for any person to place or erect any sign, signal, or traffic control device for off-highway traffic upon public lands unless authorized by law.
